headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -154.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 65% over 7 days (strong momentum)
Alert: Overall sentiment has significantly decreased (z=-3.42)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 149 quotes and overwhelming strong intensity (114 out of 149) - people are expressing serious anger today.

• At 101.9, frustrations sit in the upper half of the typical range while fears jumped dramatically from yesterday's negative territory.

• Optimism crashed to its lowest point in over 3 months, falling 56 points from yesterday's positive reading.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
